case_title: JIAN SHAO RONG VS. EDWARD LOWE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONG, JIAN SHAO AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, RYAN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RONG, JIAN SHAO AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, EDWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-31-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, EDWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED SEP-08-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, RYAN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,628.31 FILED BY RONG, JIAN SHAO AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, EDWARD LOWE, RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONG, JIAN SHAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWE, EDWARD LOWE, RYAN $1,314.15 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,394.15, PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TOTAL $2,628.31 ALLOCATION OF FAULT IS 50% TO EACH PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RONG, JIAN SHAO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT EDWARD LOWE WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---CINDY WONG.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
